message:
test(actor+error+io_op+tracing): B10 wave 7 invariant tests

Actor: 24 new tests (43 total) covering ActorId Debug/Display/Copy/Hash,
ActorState Debug/inequality/sequential transitions, SupervisorMessage
Debug/Clone, SupervisedOutcome Debug, MailboxConfig boundary/Debug,
ActorContext duplicate children/stop_self idempotency/self_ref/deadline,
ActorHandle/ActorRef/ActorStateCell Debug.

Error: 25 new tests (35 total) covering exhaustive ErrorKind category
mapping (40 variants), recoverability classification (Transient/Permanent/
Unknown), recovery action variants, BackoffHint constants/Default,
convenience constructors (data_too_large, insufficient_symbols, routing_failed,
lease_expired, quorum_not_reached, node_unavailable, internal),
is_* predicates, Cancelled struct conversion, SendError/RecvError Cancelled
variants, ResultExt with_context lazy, AcquireError Debug/Eq.

IoOp: 4 new tests (6 total) covering Debug format, id accessor,
abort with explicit reason (Explicit variant), submit without description.

TracingCompat: 6 new tests (10 total) covering NoopGuard Debug,
NoopSpan Debug/Clone/Copy, Level equality/ordering/Debug, Span type alias,
all span macros compilation, Instrument trait noop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
